creator: ml@netfence.it
text:
(In reply to Timur I. Bakeyev from comment #52)

I agree on providing a port that works on 13.1 as a first step: surely that's better than nothing.

Also, working on 12.3, albeit slower or only in some cases, is better than not working.

How much work would porting these changes to a future 12.x be?
How much likely would it be, that this could happen?
(Of course "zero chance" is an accettable answer).
